title: Hesperolinon confertum
taxonomy: Hesperolinon confertum is a species of flowering plant in the family Liliaceae, commonly known as the yellow-star lily or the yellow star lily. It is native to California and Baja California in North America. This perennial wildflower produces yellow flowers with six petals. Hesperolinon confertum belongs to the genus Hesperolinon, which is a group of flowering plants endemic to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The classification of Hesperolinon confertum reflects its unique characteristics and geographical distribution.
